title: Signing Event Record
description: JSON Schema for a KMS signing or verification event record used in Tanden Trust Audit PoC.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this signing event (UUID v4).

evidenceId.description: Identifier of the evidence record that was signed or verified.

digestHex.description: SHA-256 digest of the evidence record in lowercase hexadecimal (64 characters).

kmsKeyId.description: ARN or key ID of the AWS KMS key used for signing or verification.

signedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the signing or verification operation was performed.

signerRoleArn.description: ARN of the IAM role that performed the signing or verification operation.

valid.description: Result of a VERIFY operation. true if the signature was valid, false otherwise.
